title: Seaweed Liquid Fertiliser | 2.5L | Premium Fertiliser | Organic | Boost for all Plants | Healthy Growth OFFER : Buy 2 and get the 3rd FREE
features: 🌱 Concentrated 2.5L Liquid Seaweed Fertiliser Highly potent organic kelp extract designed for gardeners who want maximum plant nourishment with minimal application — perfect for small to medium gardens and potted plants.

💧 Dual Application: Soil Drench & Foliar Spray Versatile fertiliser that can be applied directly to soil or sprayed onto foliage for rapid nutrient absorption and enhanced photosynthesis in vegetables, fruits, flowers, and herbs.
🌿 Enhances Plant Immunity & Stress Resistance Contains natural growth hormones and micronutrients that help plants resist pests, diseases, and environmental stressors such as drought and frost.

🍅 Ideal for Organic Vegetable Gardens & Edible Crops Certified organic and safe for edible plants, this seaweed fertiliser encourages bigger yields, improved fruit quality, and healthier root systems.

♻️ Eco-Friendly, Biodegradable & Sustainable Made from sustainably harvested seaweed, this liquid fertiliser supports organic gardening practices and is safe for beneficial insects, pollinators, pets, and wildlife.
description: Product description Premium 2.5L Concentrated Organic Seaweed Fertiliser – Powerful Liquid Kelp Extract for Soil, Root & Foliar Growth SALE OFFER : Buy 2 and get the 3rd FREE Boost your plants’ health naturally with this premium 2.5 litre concentrated organic seaweed fertiliser, specially formulated to deliver essential seaweed extracts that promote vigorous growth throughout the entire growing season. Perfect for both foliar application and soil drenching, this liquid kelp concentrate enhances root development, improves soil structure, and supports lush foliage and abundant produce. This versatile seaweed extract fertiliser is ideal for use on vegetables, fruits, flowers, herbs, lawns, and ornamental plants. Its powerful nutrient blend strengthens plants at every stage by conditioning the soil microbiome, stimulating root growth, and boosting foliar nutrient absorption for healthier, more resilient crops. Key Benefits: Concentrated 2.5L organic seaweed extract fertiliser Supports robust root growth, foliar health & fruiting Improves soil conditioning and microbial activity Suitable for all plant types: vegetable gardens, flowers, lawns & more Easy foliar spray or soil drench application Natural, eco-friendly, and safe for organic gardening Ingredients Liquid Plant Food Directions Grows plants twice as big. Feed your plants the nutrients they need to grow twice as big (versus unfed plants)! Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Wear protective clothing, gloves, and eye/face protection during application. Do not eat, drink, or smoke during application. In case of accidental ingestion, seek medical advice and show the container label. Dispose of empty container in accordance with local regulations. See more
